class.name: PlayFabAsyncOp
class.brief_description: Async operation handle for PlayFab requests.
class.description: Represents an in-flight asynchronous PlayFab operation. Connect to [signal completed] or poll [method is_done] to observe completion, then call [method get_result] to inspect the [PlayFabResult].

method.name: is_done
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the async operation has completed.

method.name: cancel
method.description: Attempts to cancel the in-flight operation. Returns [code]true[/code] when cancellation was requested successfully.

method.name: get_result
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabResult] of the completed operation.

signal.name: completed
signal.description: Emitted when the async operation completes. The [param result] contains the operation outcome.
